item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 281530Z AUTO 17005KT 9999 -RA FEW034/// BKN050/// BKN072/// ///TCU 24/19 Q1021 TEMPO -TSRA FEW060CB
